title: pulicaria alveolosa
intro: Pulicaria alveolosa, also known as Egyptian fleabane or Egyptian daisy, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to various health benefits. The health benefits of Pulicaria alveolosa include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, it is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a tincture or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
